result.status_detail: coral.cohere.com still redirects to dashboard.cohere.com after login + hard reload — no chat UI available

notes: W0e retest iter=2. Confirmed logged-in (dashboard.cohere.com shows Team/Billing/Profile menu = authenticated). coral.cohere.com → 302 → dashboard.cohere.com is a service-side permanent redirect (coral chat product deprecated). Cannot submit prompt; cannot evaluate 차단 warning. Recommend marking cohere as W0e service-deprecated and removing from smoke batch.
